content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree TTT consisting of NNN nodes, rooted at node 111. The nodes are numbered 1,2,ŌĆ”,N1, 2, \ldots, N1,2,ŌĆ”,N.

dep(x)\text{dep}(x)dep(x) is defined as the number of nodes on the path from the root node 111 and the node xxx. Note that this means dep(1)=1\text{dep}(1) = 1dep(1)=1.

lca(x,y)\text{lca}(x, y)lca(x,y) is defined as the node zzz with the largest value of dep(z)\text{dep}(z)dep(z) that lies on both the paths (1,x)(1, x)(1,x) and (1,y)(1, y)(1,y).

For a given subset S=[A1,A2,ŌĆ”,AŌłŻSŌłŻ]S = [A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_{|S|}]S=[A1ŌĆŗ,A2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,AŌłŻSŌłŻŌĆŗ], we define score(S)\text{score}(S)score(S) as

Ōłæi=1ŌłŻSŌłŻŌłæj=i+1ŌłŻSŌłŻdep(lca(Ai,Aj))\sum_{i = 1}^{|S|} \sum_{j = i + 1}^{|S|} \text{dep}(\text{lca}(A_i, A_j))i=1ŌłæŌłŻSŌłŻŌĆŗj=i+1ŌłæŌłŻSŌłŻŌĆŗdep(lca(AiŌĆŗ,AjŌĆŗ))Initially, S={}S = \{\}S={}. You are given QQQ updates of the following form:


Given a node XXX, for each node YYY which lies in the subtree of XXX:

if YŌłłSY \in SYŌłłS, remove YYY from SSS.
if YŌłēSY \notin SYŌłł/S, add YYY to SSS.


A node YYY is said to lie in the subtree of XXX if XXX lies on the path from node 111 to YYY. Note that this means node XXX lies in its own subtree.

Find the value of score(S)\text{score}(S)score(S) after each update.

The tree is given in the form of par2,par3,ŌĆ”,parN\text{par}_2, \text{par}_3, \ldots, \text{par}_Npar2ŌĆŗ,par3ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,parNŌĆŗ such that 1Ōēżpari<i1 \le \text{par}_i < i1ŌēżpariŌĆŗ<i, and there is an edge between (pari,i)(\text{par}_i, i)(pariŌĆŗ,i) for each 2ŌēżiŌēżN2 \le i \le N2ŌēżiŌēżN.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line contains 222 integers - NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NŌłÆ1N - 1NŌłÆ1 integers - par2,par3,ŌĆ”,parN\text{par}_2, \text{par}_3, \ldots, \text{par}_Npar2ŌĆŗ,par3ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,parNŌĆŗ.
The next QQQ lines contain 111 integer each - XXX, the node for this update.




Output Format
For each test case, output QQQ integers on a single line, the value of score(S)score(S)score(S) after each update.
constraints: The sum of NNN and the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 2Ōŗģ1052 \cdot 10^52Ōŗģ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111 : The updates happen as follows:

After first update, S={1,2,3}S = \{1, 2, 3\}S={1,2,3}, score(S)=dep(lca(1,2))+dep(lca(2,3))+dep(lca(1,3))=dep(1)+dep(1)+dep(1)=3\text{score}(S) = \text{dep}(\text{lca}(1, 2)) + \text{dep}(\text{lca}(2, 3)) + \text{dep}(\text{lca}(1, 3)) = \text{dep}(1) + \text{dep}(1) + \text{dep}(1) = 3score(S)=dep(lca(1,2))+dep(lca(2,3))+dep(lca(1,3))=dep(1)+dep(1)+dep(1)=3.
After second update, S={1,3}S = \{1, 3\}S={1,3}, score(S)=dep(lca(1,3))=1\text{score}(S) = \text{dep}(\text{lca}(1, 3)) = 1score(S)=dep(lca(1,3))=1.
After third update, S={1}S = \{1\}S={1}, score(S)=0\text{score}(S) = 0score(S)=0.
